PORK CHOPS WITH APPLES : PORK CHOPS WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE

MAIN RECIPE: PORK CHOPS WITH APPLES

Ingredients:
- 4 thick-cut pork chops (about 1.5 inches)
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 large onion, sliced
- 3 tart apples (Granny Smith), cored and sliced
- 1/2 cup apple cider or white wine
- 1/4 cup chicken stock
- 1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
- 1 teaspoon fresh thyme
- 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon

Instructions for Apple Version:
Pat pork chops dry, season generously with salt and pepper.
Heat butter and oil in large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear pork chops 4-5 minutes per side until golden.
Transfer to plate and set aside.
In same skillet, sauté onion 3 minutes until softened.
Add apple slices and cook 2 minutes.
Pour in cider and stock, scraping up browned bits.
Stir in mustard, thyme, and cinnamon.
Return pork chops to skillet.
Cover and simmer 10-12 minutes until pork reaches 145°F.
Remove from heat, season with salt and pepper.

Serve hot with apple-onion mixture spooned over chops.

---

VARIATION: PORK CHOPS WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE

Ingredients:
- 4 thick-cut pork chops
- Salt and pepper
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 8 oz mushrooms, sliced (cremini, shiitake, or mixed)
- 3 cloves garlic, minced
- 1/2 cup beef or chicken stock
- 1/4 cup sour cream or heavy cream
- 2 tablespoons Dijon mustard
- 1 tablespoon fresh parsley
- 1 teaspoon fresh marjoram

Instructions for Mushroom Version:
Pat pork chops dry and season with salt and pepper.
Heat butter and oil in large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear pork chops 4-5 minutes per side until browned.
Remove and set aside on plate.
Add sliced mushrooms to same skillet, sauté 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic, cook 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in stock, scraping browned bits from pan.
Stir in mustard and sour cream until smooth.
Return pork chops to skillet.
Cover and simmer 10-12 minutes until internal temp reaches 145°F.
Season with salt and pepper.
Garnish with fresh parsley and marjoram.

Both versions:
Prep time: 15 minutes
Cooking time: 25 minutes
Serves: 4 people

Serving suggestion: Serve with egg noodles, mashed potatoes, or steamed vegetables.
